name: kaleidoscope
description: Browser-based kaleidoscope tool for high-resolution still-image output. WebGL2 fragment shader engine with a forms registry for symmetry patterns.
author: Daniel Nelson

scripts.check: for f in src/version.js src/main.js src/shell/*.js src/engine/*.js src/engine/forms/*.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done && echo all syntax checks pass
scripts.ios: vite build && cap sync ios && cap open ios
